MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: We only include item-level data, we do not include summary scores due to the complexities in how puberty is staged.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: Because our research is about how children develop into teenagers and young adults, it is important for us to know where you are in terms of your physical development. You can complete this short questionnaire on your own. I will hand this off to you so I can't see your responses but if you have any questions, please feel free to ask. When you reach the final screen after the questionnaire, please ask me for instructions.

tanner_girl_1.Description: Would you say that your growth in height:

Levels.1: Has not yet begun to spurt ("spurt" means faster growth than usual)

tanner_girl_2.Description: Have you noticed any skin changes, especially pimples?

Levels.1: Skin has not yet started changing

tanner_girl_3.Description: Have you begun to menstruate (started to have your period)?

tanner_girl_4.Description: If yes, how old were you when you started to menstruate?

tanner_girl_5.Description: What about the growth of body hair ("body hair" means hair any place other than the head, such as under the arms)?

Levels.1: Has not yet started to grow

tanner_girl_6.Description: Have you noticed that your breasts have begun to grow?

tanner_girl_7.Description: The following pictures show different stages of pubic hair growth. A girl goes through each of the five stages shown. Please look at each picture and read the sentence below it. Click on the picture that is closest to your stage. If you remove your body hair, please select the picture that would look most like you if you didn't.

tanner_girl_8.Description: The following pictures show how the breasts grow. A girl can go though each of the five stages shown. Please look at each picture and read the sentence below it. Click on the picture that is closest to your stage.
